title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, argues that ad-based monetization is the future for AI tools, contrary to 2024 VC consensus favoring subscriptions. He identifies human trust adoption as the true bottleneck for AI agents, not technological limitations.
